originalFeedback.title: Original Feedback
originalFeedback.description: The raw feedback, complaint, or evaluation text provided by the user.
originalFeedback.example: His work is a mess. Deadlines keep slipping.

improvedFeedback.title: Improved Feedback
improvedFeedback.description: The feedback refined by SCDFT with total clarity, honesty, and structured, professional language.
improvedFeedback.example: Andre is facing serious challenges in consistently meeting deadlines.

toneUsed.title: Tone Used
toneUsed.description: The tone applied to the feedback.

status.title: Status
status.description: The success or failure status of the processing.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The processing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

context.title: Context
context.description: The context of the feedback (e.g., performance review, customer complaint, product review, public report).

recipientName.title: Recipient Name
recipientName.description: Name of the recipient, if provided.

auditHash.title: Audit Hash
auditHash.description: A unique SHA‑256 hash of the output for audit trail and accountability.
